title: Fancy Block Particles - Renewed
description: 3D Digging Particles! Original mod by MorphoxL
body:
![image](https://i.imgur.com/1sFio8F.png)\ Fancy Block Particles is a client-side mod that turns basic 2D particles in vanilla Minecraft into cool 3D animated particles!\ This is revamped MorphoxL's Fancy Block Particles mod, ported to the latest versions of Minecraft. ## Description This mod introduces 3D particles into the game, offering the flexibility to customize their options according to your individual preferences. If you find any of the particles undesirable, you can decrease their quantity or disable them entirely. Once disabled (via the FBP panel), standard vanilla particles will appear. **This mod should be installed on the client side only!** Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack! ### Particles & Animations #### Block placing animation and breaking particles: ![image](https://i.imgur.com/H0q8pHN.gif) #### Flame, lava, smoke and campfire smoke particles: ![image](https://i.imgur.com/JcIIAkj.gif) #### Firefly particles: ![image](https://i.imgur.com/0xYnkah.gif) #### Drip particles: ![image](https://i.imgur.com/24RpkCg.gif) #### Rain particles: ![image](https://i.imgur.com/7VDUAkF.gif) #### Snow particles: ![image](https://i.imgur.com/x5NnVa7.gif) ### Settings FBP gives you the ability to customize the most essential breaking particle settings according to your preferences. To access the FBP panel, press **I** key (default) on your keyboard. ![image](https://i.imgur.com/RPdhY21.png) You also have the option to adjust settings through the config file located at `config/fbp/config.json` if you need. ### Keybindings | Name | Key | |-----------------------------------|:-------------:| | Enable/disable mod | **Unbound** | | Enable/disable placing animations | **Unbound** | | Open settings | **I** | | Toggle freeze effect | **R** | | Kill particles | **Unbound** | | Fast add block to blacklist | **X** | | Fast add held block to blacklist | **Shift + X** | | Reload config | **Unbound** | ### OptiFine/Iris compatibility FBP **should be** compatible with OptiFine and Iris. \ If you notice any bugs that occur exclusively when using FBP with OptiFine, Iris or another shader mod, please report them [here](https://github.com/Hantonik/FancyBlockParticles/issues/new?labels=bug&template=bug_report.yml "Enter all the necessary information!"). **However**, keep in mind that not all such issues can be resolved! ## Downloads [Minecraft 26.1.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=26.1.2 "Then just click download ;)")\ [Minecraft 1.21.11](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=1.21.11 "Then just click download ;)")\ [Minecraft 1.20.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=1.20.6 "Then just click download ;)")\ [Minecraft 1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=1.19.4 "Then just click download ;)")\ [Minecraft 1.18.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=1.18.2 "Then just click download ;)")\ [Minecraft 1.17.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=1.17.1 "Then just click download ;)")\ [Minecraft 1.16.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/fbp-renewed/versions?g=1.16.5 "Then just click download ;)") For older versions or the original mod, go [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fancy-block-particles). ## Contribution **Found a bug?** Report it [here](https://github.com/Hantonik/FancyBlockParticles/issues/new?labels=bug&template=bug_report.yml "Enter all the necessary information!"), and I'll try to fix it!\ **Have an idea for a new feature?** Tell me more about it [here](https://github.com/Hantonik/FancyBlockParticles/issues/new?labels=enhancement&template=feature_request.yml "I'm open to suggestions!")! ## Code [Click me](https://github.com/Hantonik/FancyBlockParticles "All the magic is here!") for **source code**! "If you want to use my code, feel free, but remember to mention whose code it is!

Take care, author."

 ## Support **I do it out of passion**, but if you want to appreciate my work, you can do it by [buying me a coffee](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/hantonik "Here!"), **thanks <3**!
